description_long: This object is a visually appealing sandwich meal presented in a rectangular cardboard box. The box contains three long baguette-style sandwich rolls, each with a golden-brown crust and a soft, airy interior. Nestled among the baguettes are slices of cured meat, possibly prosciutto or salami, and a folded slice of cheese, adding color and texture contrast. The front of the box features handwritten text, including the name 'Mr CHRIS' and a note, giving it a personalized, artisanal touch. The sandwiches appear generously filled, with visible herbs and a creamy spread on the cut surfaces. The overall presentation suggests a fresh, gourmet sandwich selection suitable for takeaway or casual urban dining.
description: A trio of baguette sandwiches with cured meat and cheese, attractively arranged in a personalized cardboard box. The sandwiches feature golden crusts, visible herbs, and a creamy filling.
description_view_0: Three baguette sandwiches with visible cheese and cured meat slices are arranged in a cardboard box, with handwritten text on the front.
description_view_1: The cut face of a sandwich reveals a green herb spread, with slices of cured meat and cheese visible behind, and 'Mr CHRIS' written on the box.
description_view_2: The sandwiches are seen from the opposite side, showing more of the cured meat and cheese, with a note written on the box front.
description_view_3: The back view highlights the herb-filled sandwich face and cured meat slices, with minimal text visible on the box.
